english_text:
ELOQUENCE
PRECISE — Accurately deliver intent
CONCISE — As few words as possible
Order of words
Choice of words
alt_text: Diagram titled 'ELOQUENCE' with two boxes: PRECISE (accurately deliver intent) and CONCISE (as few words as possible). PRECISE branches downward to Order of words and Choice of words.
notes: Pedagogical: the two pillars of eloquence — precision and concision.
